narrative:
Newton Twp (precinct in Pike County) has 1,221 registered voters, with 60.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a clear Republican lean of 10.3 percentage points.
